name: Granola Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Granola (ground finely in the blender)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients in the order listed, selecting the white bread setting and pressing "start".
2. (Optional) Add half a cup of raisins or dates for extra flavor.
3. Note: All ingredients should be at room temperature unless otherwise specified.
4. Mix on manual mode if not using a bread machine.
5. After the second kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion in small loaf pans and cover.
7. Let the dough rise until doubled, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
